title: KNK Labs
summary: KNK Labs is a human-interface technology company building intelligent wearable systems and smart apparel. The company develops sensor-equipped clothing and wearable hardware that bridges physical apparel and digital technology.
shortDescription: A digital experience for a wearable technology company building intelligent smart apparel and human-interface systems.

overview: KNK Labs is a human-interface technology company developing intelligent wearable systems and smart apparel.
The challenge was translating highly technical products into a digital experience that could communicate innovation without overwhelming visitors with engineering terminology.
challenges: The products sit at the intersection of clothing, wearable technology, sensors, and hardware.
The website needed to communicate complex ideas while remaining approachable to investors, partners, and potential customers.
approach: Used large visual sections to support product storytelling.
Built responsive layouts with performance in mind.
outcome: The final website presents advanced wearable technologies in a way that feels approachable, modern, and technically credible.
caseStudy.pullQuote: Technical products need clarity before they need complexity.

interactionPreview.label: Interaction preview
interactionPreview.caption: A short preview of the KNK Labs website experience.
